title: bulk-upload.completed payload (v1)
description: Emitted when a bulk resume-archive ingest finishes. Matches the typed BulkUploadCompletedPayloadSchema in packages/contracts. NOTE: the SUBJECT domain is `bulk-upload` (subject tenant.{tenantId}.bulk-upload.completed) but it rides the RESUME_EVENTS stream (its subject list includes tenant.*.bulk-upload.>). Consumed off the RESUME_EVENTS stream by notification-service.
x-consumers: notification-service (BULK_UPLOAD_COMPLETED notification to the uploader + webhook fan-out)

userId.description: User who started the upload; notified directly.
